ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nursing_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nursing role */,
  "role_title" TEXT /* Title of the nursing role (e.g., Registered Nurses) */,
  "current_2020" INTEGER /* Current number of positions in 2020 */,
  "projected_2030" INTEGER /* Projected number of positions in 2030 */,
  "percentage_change" TEXT /* Percentage change in positions over the decade */,
  "yearly_openings" INTEGER /* Estimated yearly openings for the role */,
  "minimum_education_requirement" TEXT /* Minimum educational requirement for the role */,
  "certification_required" INTEGER /* Indicates whether a certification is required for the role */,
  "average_salary" REAL /* Average salary for the role */,
  "current_2023" INTEGER /* Current number of positions in 2023 */,
  "projected_2035" INTEGER /* Projected number of positions in 2035 */,
  "percentage_change_2023_2035" TEXT /* Percentage change in positions from 2023 to 2035 */,
  "yearly_openings_2023_2035" INTEGER /* Estimated yearly openings for the role from 2023 to 2035 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workforce_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nursing role associated with the trend */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend observation */,
  "openings" INTEGER /* Number of openings in the corresponding year */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the role for that year */,
  "total_staff" INTEGER /* Total number of staff in the year */,
  "retirement_rate" REAL /* Retirement rate for the role in the year */,
  "attrition_rate" REAL /* Attrition rate for the role in the year */,
  "hiring_rate" REAL /* Hiring rate for the role in the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workforce_trends_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES nursing_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recruitment_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recruitment campaign */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nursing role targeted by the campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the recruitment campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "targeted_demographics" TEXT /* Target demographics for the campaign */,
  "number_of_hires" INTEGER /* Number of hires made through the campaign */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Success rate of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recruitment_campaigns_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES nursing_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nursing role related to the program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "duration_months" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in months */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the training program */,
  "number_of_participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the program */,
  "completion_rate" REAL /* Completion rate of the program */,
  "impact_on_performance" TEXT /* Impact of the program on job performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_programs_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES nursing_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staffing_needs" (
  "need_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staffing need record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the staffing needs are anticipated */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nursing role related to the staffing need */,
  "anticipated_needs" INTEGER /* Anticipated number of staff needed for the year */,
  "current_staff" INTEGER /* Current number of staff for the year */,
  "shortage" INTEGER /* Number of staff needed to meet the anticipated needs */,
  "recruitment_effort" TEXT /* Level of recruitment effort required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("need_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staffing_needs_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES nursing_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_benchmarks" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark record */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nursing role for which the benchmark applies */,
  "benchmark_year" INTEGER /* Year of the benchmark data */,
  "average_salary" REAL /* Average salary for the role in that year */,
  "employment_growth" REAL /* Predicted employment growth rate for the role */,
  "median_salary" REAL /* Median salary for the role in the year */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate for the role in the year */,
  "job_satisfaction" REAL /* Job satisfaction score for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industry_benchmarks_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES nursing_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., HR, Manager) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the user role */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Level of access */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role assigned to the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last activity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("user_role_id")
)
